TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_waheng, title = waheng, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/waheng} }

S.FORM: == waheng == u zuma a kamu: nu Hulam:智齒 nu Amilika: nu Zipun: u canan ku ː namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinenganː == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinenganː ==
S.PHON: == waħəŋ == u zuma a kamu: nu ħur~ɾam:** nu amir~ɾika: nu zipun: u ʦanan ku * namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan* == mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan* ==
S.FORM: == waheng == u zuma a kamu: nu Hulam:智齒 nu Amilika: nu Zipun: u canan ku ː namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinenganː == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinenganː ==
S.PHON: == waħəŋ == u zuma a kamu: nu ħur~ɾam:** nu amir~ɾika: nu zipun: u ʦanan ku * namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan* == mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan* ==
